name: Potato & Egg Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the potatoes thinly.
2. Sprinkle the sliced potatoes with salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
3. Heat the bacon fat in a skillet over medium heat. Add the potatoes and cook, stirring frequently, until they are browned and tender.
4. Transfer the cooked potatoes to a greased 1-quart casserole dish. Sprinkle evenly with grated cheese.
5. Carefully break the eggs over the cheese. Cover with evaporated milk.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
7. Serve immediately.
